name: RED RIVER BANCSHARES INC
business: Red River Bancshares, Inc. is a bank holding company that, through its wholly owned subsidiary Red River Bank, provides a fully integrated suite of banking products and services tailored to the needs of commercial and retail customers in Louisiana.

exposures.sentence: Since 2021, we have invested in JAM FINTOP to strategically develop technology partnerships as we expand our digital offerings.
risks associated with system failures or failures to protect against cybersecurity threats, such as breaches of our network security
